name: Bottled Aurora — No. VII
description: A hand-captured slice of northern lights, sealed in Venetian glass. Swirl gently before opening at midnight. Side effects may include spontaneous poetry.

name: Moon-Thread Scarf
description: Woven from threads that only exist during the waning crescent. Warms the wearer with memories of summers they never had.

name: Clock That Remembers Tomorrow
description: Its hands move counterclockwise on Tuesdays. Ticks in a language your grandmother almost spoke. Batteries not included — runs on intention.

name: Velvet Whisper Earrings
description: Rose-gold drops that hum faintly when someone is thinking of you. Impossible to photograph correctly — they look better in person and in dreams.

name: Starlight Reserve Tea
description: Leaves harvested during meteor showers, aged in cedar chests lined with constellation maps. Brew with water that has never seen a city.

name: Phantom Parfum — L'Absente
description: A fragrance that smells different to every wearer: rain on stone, old libraries, or the moment before a first kiss. The bottle is always slightly cold.
